notes: Solid breakout implementation with proper brick colors, scoring, lives, and ball physics, but keyboard controls are overridden by mouse position every frame making arrow keys non-functional unless mouse is stationary at center.
Excellent implementation with great physics and visuals, but keyboard movement is completely broken because the paddle position is unconditionally overwritten by the mouse position every frame.

Core Breakout loop works and looks appropriate, but keyboard control is undermined because mouse position forcibly overrides paddle movement every frame, which hurts reliable input and overall playability.
